messages.message: COMMAND CENTER TYPE IMPORT FIXES COMPLETE. All @findasale/shared import errors resolved. Files changed: (1) packages/shared/src/index.ts — removed commandCenter export, (2) packages/backend/src/types/commandCenter.ts — new local copy, (3) packages/backend/src/services/commandCenterService.ts — import from '../types/commandCenter', (4) packages/frontend/types/commandCenter.ts — new local copy, (5) packages/frontend/components/CommandCenterCard.tsx — import from '../types/commandCenter', (6) packages/frontend/hooks/useCommandCenter.ts — import from '../types/commandCenter', (7) packages/backend/src/controllers/stripeController.ts — removed invalidateCommandCenterCache call + import (organizerId property bug fixed by deletion). Verification: grep confirms zero @findasale/shared in commandCenter files.

SESSION 169 STRATEGIC AUDIT IMPLEMENTATION COMPLETE. All documentation recommendations from the audit applied: (1) CORE.md §3.4 (post-compression re-read mandate) + §4.10 (compression-aware push checklist) added. (2) conversation-defaults updates drafted in s169-conversation-defaults-updates.md (3 new rules + 3 revisions) — requires skill maintainer to apply to global skill. (3) CLAUDE.md §9 (push block guarantee) + §10 (subagent push ban, experimental S169-171) added. (4) patrick-language-map.md updated with unified tool terminology enforcement gate. Files changed: CORE.md, CLAUDE.md, patrick-language-map.md, s169-conversation-defaults-updates.md (new). Ready for push.

PROMOTE PAGE UX SPEC COMPLETE. Design spec for /promote/[saleId] page finalized: page layout (desktop & mobile), UX copy (headings, button labels, helper text for all 3 export formats), interaction flows (download & copy-to-clipboard happy paths), error states (404, 403, 400, 500), empty states, success states, mobile responsiveness checklist, accessibility audit (WCAG AA), design tokens (colors, typography, spacing). Spec location: claude_docs/ux-spotchecks/PROMOTE_PAGE_UX_SPEC.md. Key decision: Download as primary action, Copy to Clipboard as secondary. Help section collapsible on mobile. All buttons full-width stacked on phones. Ready for findasale-dev to implement.

SPRINT 2 ARCHITECTURE DESIGN COMPLETE. Three features specified: (1) Cloudinary watermark utility, (2) export controller (EstateSales.NET CSV / Facebook JSON / Craigslist text), (3) promote.tsx frontend page. All specifications include function signatures, schema (none needed), error handling, and testing checklist. Ready for dev handoff. Files to create: 5 new (watermark utility, export controller, export routes, promote page, export helpers), files to modify: 4 (shared types, route registration, package.json, dashboard). No schema changes.

SESSION 167 CONTEXT MAINTENANCE COMPLETE. Production unblocked (Railway, Vercel, Neon 82/82 all healthy). Files updated: STATE.md (Sprint 1→2 status), session-log.md (S167 entry), next-session-prompt.md (Sprint 2 handoff), context.md (regenerated). Wrap timestamp: 2026-03-15T15:35:35Z.

SESSION 166 CONTEXT UPDATE COMPLETE. STATE.md, session-log.md, next-session-prompt.md, .checkpoint-manifest.json updated and pushed to GitHub main (commits: 25d7b52, 0d4fdfc). Sprint 1 dev dispatch in progress.
